title: North Star Canvas
description: L1 North Star metric + input metrics + Goodhart guard. Permissive: type-pins established top-level keys. Added 2026-06-12 (gap analysis). Witnessed failure this schema's parse-layer would have caught: roadmap north-star.yml broken YAML 2026-05-23 (cluster instance 14).

metric.description: The North Star metric itself: name, definition, current value.

input_metrics.description: Leading input metrics that drive the North Star.

guardrails.description: Counter-metrics guarding against optimizing the North Star at the expense of health.

goodhart_check.description: Explicit Goodhart's-Law audit block: how this metric could be gamed and what watches for it.
